title: tylophora wallichii
intro: Tylophora wallichii, also known as Asle or Indian ipecac, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Tylophora wallichii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Tylophora wallichii can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is often used to treat conditions such as asthma, bronchitis, and eczema.
